rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §28.02124 governs parental options for student grade retention and course repetition. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 28.02124. PARENTAL OPTION FOR STUDENT RETENTION.
_note: No conflict; rule text is education-related and has no connection to property tax homestead exemptions.
